subject: A dark-skinned humanoid figure being swallowed by a swirling vortex of test papers and a curved library/lecture-hall interior; the figure's head is fragmenting into multiple screaming/contorted faces wreathed in white papers and feathered quills
description: A humanoid figure with dark silhouetted skin is suspended at the center of a curving blue vortex that resolves into a vast lecture hall or library interior with rows of seating and shelves wrapping around the figure. The figure's head and shoulders erupt into multiple ghostly faces — some screaming, some weeping — surrounded by a storm of white test papers and feather-quill plumes. One outstretched hand clutches a feathered quill trailing a red-tipped ribbon; the other hand is splayed in panic. The whole scene is bathed in cold cyan-blue light, suggesting nightmare logic and academic dread.
foreground: humanoid figure with multiple emerging faces, clutching a quill, surrounded by swirling papers
background: curved lecture-hall or library interior receding into a tunnel-like vortex
